description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: When using this skill, removes <color=#28d9ed>2</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff(s)</color> from all enemies, then attacks them. Deals increased damage and inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Reduced Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color> if the target is inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color>.
description.kr: 스킬 사용 시 적 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2개</color> 해제하고 적 전체를 공격합니다. 대상이 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color> 상태라면 피해가 증가하고 스킬 사용 후 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: スキル使用時、敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2個</color>解除し、敵全体にダメージを与える。対象が<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状態の場合、ダメージがUPし、スキル使用後<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 使用技能时,解除全体敌人的<color=#28d9ed>2个</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>,并攻击全体敌人。若目标处于<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状态,则使伤害提升,且使用技能后<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect) Increases ally damage dealt to targets inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color>.
description.kr: (패시브 효과) <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color> 보유 대상에 대한 아군 피해량이 증가합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果) <color=#28d9ed>出血</color>がある対象に対する味方全体のダメージがUPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)对处于<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状态的目标,友军造成的伤害提高。

description.en: (Passive Effect) At the start of the turn, inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> that ignores <color=#28d9ed>Immunity</color> on a random enemy for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: (패시브 효과) 턴 시작 시 무작위 적 한 명에게 <color=#28d9ed>면역</color>을 무시하는 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\nターン開始時、ランダムの敵単体に<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>を無視する<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: (被动效果)回合开始时,对1名随机敌人赋予无视<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>的<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

name.en: Blessing of the Tower of Darkness

description.en:
Always increases Penetration by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and Critical Hit Chance by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.

Increases Damage Dealt by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
Reduces enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color> at the end of the turn.
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

피해량이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다.
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.jp:
常時貫通力が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、会心率が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPする。

与えるダメージが<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPする。
ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>DOWNさせる。
description.zh:
穿透力始终提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,暴击率始终提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>

伤害量提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
回合结束时,敌队CP减少<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
